title: Storyteller Toolbox generator table
description: A rollable table. Entry text may reference other tables with {table:<id>} placeholders, which the engine resolves recursively. Weights are relative (default 1).

id.description: Stable path-like identifier, e.g. "gm/tavern/names". Used by {table:<id>} references and URLs — never rename casually.

title.description: Human-readable name shown in the UI.

pillar.description: Which pillar of the site this table belongs to.

description.description: Optional one-paragraph explanation of what this table generates.

tags.description: Genre and topic tags (e.g. fantasy, horror, sci-fi, western). Genre pages are filters over these tags — genre is metadata, never a folder.

credits.description: Where the content came from. Preserve community attribution (r/d100, r/BehindTheTables, DnDSpeak, etc.).

entries.description: The rollable entries. A bare string is shorthand for { "text": <string>, "weight": 1 }.

tags.description: Entry-level tags for filtering (e.g. an entry only fitting horror).
